result.stderr:
Mapster.Tool 10.0.6+e192f413392e6ee5437ee115e551582bb6f52c5b
Copyright (c) 2026 Chaowlert Chaisrichalermpol, Eric Swann, Andreas Ravnestad
USAGE:
Generate extensions:
  dotnet mapster extension mapper --assembly /Path/To/YourAssembly.dll --output
  Models

  -a, --assembly             Required. Assembly to scan

  -o, --output               (Default: Models) Output directory.

  -n, --namespace            Namespace for extensions

  -p, --printFullTypeName    Set true to print full type name

  -b, --baseNamespace        Provide base namespace to generate nested output &
                             namespace

  -s, --skipExisting         Set true to skip generating already existing files

  -N, --nullableDirective    Set true to add "#nullable enable" to the top of
                             generated extension files

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

USAGE:
Generate models:
  dotnet mapster model mapper --assembly /Path/To/YourAssembly.dll --output
  Models

  -a, --assembly             Required. Assembly to scan

  -o, --output               (Default: Models) Output directory.

  -n, --namespace            Namespace for models

  -p, --printFullTypeName    Set true to print full type name

  -r, --isRecordType         Generate record type

  -b, --baseNamespace        Provide base namespace to generate nested output &
                             namespace

  -s, --skipExisting         Set true to skip generating already existing files

  -N, --nullableDirective    Set true to add "#nullable enable" to the top of
                             generated model files

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.
